result.title: Your AI Setup Needs This
result.description:
If you’re serious about AI, your laptop matters more than you think.

Most people are running powerful AI tools on hardware that’s holding them back. But what if your laptop could actually run AI on-device faster, more securely, and way more efficiently?

That’s what @amd is offering with their AMD Ryzen™ AI PRO chips that are built specifically for businesses and AI workflows.

It has:
⚡ Faster performance
🔒 Built-in security
🔋 Better battery life
🧠 AI-ready hardware

And right now you can even test one out completely for free.

If you’re running a business or just want to seriously level up your AI workflow, check out the world’s best processor for enterprise AI here: https://ryzen.pro/en/laptop/?utm_medium=social&utm_source=youtube&utm_campaign=q126_032pi%20&utm_content=mattwolfe

result.title: AI Coworkers Are Officially Here
result.description:
If your team lives in Slack, this is worth checking out.

@getviktor is an AI coworker that works where your team already works. It connects to your tools, runs multi-step workflows, and produces real outputs like reports, analysis, follow-ups, and project deliverables.

You still stay in control with approvals before important actions go out.

This feels like the shift from AI assistants to AI coworkers.

Check it out at ref.getviktor.com/mattwolfe1

#AI #AItools #AIagents #productivityhack #ViktorPartner

result.title: Anthropic Users Are PISSED
result.description:
Anthropic just got caught red handed 😳

User have been reporting a huge bug in the system that's been charging them hundred of dollars extra on top of their Max subscriptions.

Support initially refused to refund users and it feels like Anthropic only backtracked after the story got millions of views.

Not a great look...

#ai #ainews #anthropic #claudecode #vibecoding
